title: Replace hero background with AI illustration image

requirements.text: Generate an AI illustration image suitable for a solar energy services hero background — vibrant and modern, depicting solar panels, sunshine, and a clean energy landscape in an illustrated art style — and save it as the hero background asset.

quotes: Modify the hero back grount to Ai illustration image

acceptanceCriteria: A new AI-style illustrated image is generated and saved to frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-ai-illustration.dim_1920x1080.png
The image visually represents solar energy themes (panels, sunlight, clean landscape) in an illustrated art style
The image is high-resolution and suitable for a full-screen hero background

requirements.text: Update the Hero component to use the newly generated AI illustration image (hero-ai-illustration.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/) as the hero section background, replacing the current Samaleswari Temple background image.

quotes: Modify the hero back grount to Ai illustration image

acceptanceCriteria: The Hero component's background references the new AI illustration image from the generated assets folder
The hero section displays the AI illustration as a full-screen background
Existing hero content (headline, CTA buttons, trust-stat cards) remains intact and readable over the new background
Any overlay or text contrast adjustments are applied to maintain readability

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Preserve all existing hero section content (headline, WhatsApp CTA, scheme CTA, trust-stat cards)
Do not alter BankFinanceBanner financing terms (90% loan / 10% customer)
nonGoals: Modifying backend logic or data models
Redesigning the hero layout or content structure

required: AI illustration of a solar energy landscape with solar panels, bright sunshine rays, green fields, and a clear sky in a vibrant modern illustrated art style (hero-ai-illustration.dim_1920x1080.png)
